headline: General Updates
summary: The Board has approved the transfer of the company’s Seat Trim business related to certain models by way of slump sale as a going concern to its wholly owned subsidiary, NDR Auto Component South Private Limited. The Board has approved the transfer of the company’s Sunshade business by way of slump sale as a going concern to its Joint Venture, NDR Hayashi Automotive India Private Limited.

summary: Outcome of Board Meeting - Approval of the Merger of M/s. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024 Circular.

summary: Somany Ceramics Limited has informed the Exchange about meeting of the unsecured creditors of the Company scheduled to be held on Saturday, 13th June, 2026.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication - NCLT convened Meeting of equity shareholders
summary: Asian Energy Services Limited has informed the Exchange about Copy of Newspaper Advertisement of NCLT convened Meeting of equity shareholders.

headline: Updates - Report from the Audit Committee and Independent Directors certifying distribution
summary: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Report from the Audit Committee and Independent Directors of the Company certifying distribution.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: The shares of QCL and its demerged entities held by the trust are subjected to fair valuation. The Company had completed the acquisition of Resorts Business from Nature Trails Resort Private Limited (NTRPL), (Wholly owned step-down subsidiary of the Company) on 19 March 2025 through slump sale for consideration of Rs. 522.5 Mn (gross) as per the terms mentioned in the Business Transfer Agreement as per appointed date 01 March 2025.

headline: Updates
summary: Rossell India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation pertaining to the merger of Company s Registrar to an Issue and Share Transfer Agents (RTA) viz., CB Management Services Private Limited (transferor Company) with MUFG Intime India Private Limited (transferee Company) '.

headline: Updates
summary: With reference to the captioned subject, this is to inform that the Company has received email dated May 12, 2026 from CB Management Services Private Limited, Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA) of the Company that it has merged with MUFG Intime India Private Limited with effect from May 8th 2026, pursuant to the Scheme of Merger or Amalgamation and the Order dated 24th April, 2026 passed by Regional Director (WR), Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Mumbai.

summary: May 15, 2026 (i.e., closing hours of trading on May 14, 2026) on account of the Scheme of Amalgamation.

headline: Updates
summary: The withdrawal of the Scheme of Amalgamation of Paper Boat Apps Private Limited, wholly owned subsidiary of the Company with Nazara Technologies Limited filed before the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench (‘NCLT’) under Sections 230 to 232 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, in view of the change in restructuring plans of the Company. An application for withdrawal of the Scheme will be filed with the Hon’ble NCLT, in due course of time.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Lumax Auto Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange that the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, New Delhi Bench ('Hon'ble NCLT'), has vide its order pronounced on May 08, 2026, approved the Scheme of Amalgamation between IAC International Automotive India Private Limited ( Transferor Company ) and Lumax Auto Technologies Limited ( Transferee Company / the Company ) and their respective Shareholders and Creditors ( Scheme ).

headline: General Updates
summary: Kirloskar Electric Company Limited has received approval from the NCLT Bengaluru for the merger by absorption of its four wholly owned subsidiaries into the parent company. The order was issued on April 30, 2026. This consolidation aims to streamline operations and simplify the corporate structure.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Cello World Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ahmedabad Bench, has sanctioned a Scheme of Arrangement involving Wim Plast Limited, Cello Consumer Products Private Limited, and Cello World Limited. The scheme entails the demerger and transfer of a specified undertaking from Wim Plast Limited to Cello Consumer Products Private Limited on a going concern basis. The company will provide further updates on subsequent developments.

headline: Disclosure of material issue
summary: Autoline Industries Limited announced that its Board has approved a Scheme of Amalgamation to merge its wholly owned subsidiary, Autoline Design Software Limited, into the parent company. The move is intended to streamline operations and consolidate business structures.

company: S A Tech Software India Limited
headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: S A Tech Software India Limited's Board approved an amendment to its Scheme of Amalgamation with Mindpool Technologies Limited, allowing odd share entitlements to be settled via cash payout at Rs. 55.98 per share instead of allotting fractional shares. Unclaimed cash amounts will be transferred to the Investor Education and Protection Fund after seven years. The amendment is subject to approvals from shareholders, creditors, NCLT, NSE, SEBI, and other regulatory authorities.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Lloyds Enterprises Limited has received observation letters from both BSE and NSE, confirming no adverse observations or objections regarding its Composite Scheme of Arrangement. This clearance allows the company to proceed with the proposed restructuring plan.

headline: Press Release
summary: Valiant Laboratories Limited's Board has approved exploring restructuring options among the company, its holding, subsidiaries, and associates to achieve operational and strategic synergies. The potential restructuring may involve mergers, demergers, or other arrangements aimed at simplifying the corporate structure, unlocking shareholder value, and enhancing strategic focus. Further evaluations and public disclosures will follow as the Board determines the future course of action.

headline: Press Release
summary: Valiant Organics Limited's Board has approved exploring restructuring options among the company, its subsidiaries, and associates to achieve operational and strategic synergies. The potential restructuring may involve mergers, demergers, or reorganizations aimed at simplifying the holding structure and unlocking long-term shareholder value. Further evaluations will be conducted before any final decisions are made.

headline: Allotment of Securities
summary: Gujarat Gas Limited (now Gujarat Energy Limited) announced that its Board approved the allotment of 62,27,14,719 equity shares to eligible shareholders of GSPC and GSPL as per the approved Scheme. The shares, valued at INR 2 each, were allotted based on the Record Date of May 12, 2026, and will rank equally with existing shares. Fractional entitlements will be consolidated, sold via IDBI Trusteeship Services, and the proceeds distributed pro-rata to entitled shareholders.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: KEC International Limited's Board has approved a scheme to merge its wholly owned subsidiary, KEC Spur Infrastructure Private Limited, into the parent company. The merger by absorption is subject to obtaining all necessary regulatory and other approvals.

headline: General Updates
summary: Lumax Auto Technologies Limited has announced the effectiveness of the Scheme of Amalgamation with IAC International Automotive India Private Limited. The transferor company, IAC International, will merge into Lumax Auto Technologies, impacting their respective shareholders and creditors.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Timken India Limited's Board approved a Scheme of Amalgamation to merge its wholly owned subsidiary, Timken GGB Technology Private Limited, into the company, subject to shareholder, creditor, and regulatory approvals. The Board also approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, recommended a dividend of Rs. 2.50 per share, and appointed two new Senior Management Personnel.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has submitted a certified copy of a Rectification Order from the NCLT, Allahabad Bench, regarding the previously sanctioned Composite Scheme of Arrangement. This filing updates the exchange on the tribunal's order to correct or modify the original scheme approval.

headline: General Updates
summary: Lloyds Enterprises Limited announced that its material subsidiary, Lloyds Engineering Works Limited, has received No Objection Certificates from both NSE and BSE for its proposed scheme of merger. The approvals were confirmed in a filing to the stock exchanges.

headline: General Updates
summary: Info Edge (India) Limited has disclosed that it has filed an appeal before the National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) challenging an order dated April 7, 2026, passed by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) in New Delhi. The disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of SEBI's Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Lloyds Engineering Works Limited has received Non-Objection Certificates from both BSE and NSE for its proposed merger scheme. The scheme was approved by the company's Board of Directors on December 29, 2025. This clearance marks a key regulatory step toward completing the amalgamation.

headline: General Updates
summary: Gabriel India Limited has received the certified copy of the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) order sanctioning a Composite Scheme of Arrangement. The scheme involves the amalgamation of Anchemco India Private Limited into Asia Investments Private Limited, followed by the demerger of a specific undertaking into Gabriel India Limited. The company will now proceed with regulatory filings to implement the scheme.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Kothari Petrochemicals Limited's Board has approved a scheme to merge Kothari Sugars and Chemicals Limited into itself. The amalgamation will see KSCL transfer its operations and assets to KPL, which will act as the surviving entity.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Kothari Sugars And Chemicals Limited (KSCL) announced that its Board has approved a Scheme of Amalgamation merging KSCL (the transferor company) into Kothari Petrochemicals Limited (KPL, the transferee company). The proposal is now subject to necessary regulatory and shareholder approvals.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited announced that its Composite Scheme of Arrangement involving Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Limited and Triveni Power Transmission Limited has become effective as of May 19, 2026. The scheme was sanctioned by the NCLT Allahabad Bench and took effect after the certified orders were filed with the Registrar of Companies. This disclosure was made in compliance with SEBI regulations following prior updates on May 14 and May 19, 2026.

headline: General Updates
summary: Strides Pharma Science Limited announced that the Hon'ble NCLT, Bengaluru Bench, has pronounced an order approving the Scheme of Arrangement for the demerger of Arco Lab Private Limited, its wholly owned subsidiary. The demerger involves the separation of the demerged undertaking from Arco Lab. This marks a key regulatory milestone in the corporate restructuring process.

headline: General Updates
summary: Autoline Industries Limited has announced a Scheme of Amalgamation with its wholly owned subsidiary, Autoline Design Software Limited. The update, provided to the Exchange, outlines the proposed merger between the two entities.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Lenskart Solutions Limited announced that its Board approved the proposed merger of its wholly owned subsidiaries, Dealskart Online Services Private Limited and Lenskart Eyetech Private Limited, into the company. This amalgamation aims to simplify the group structure and reduce administrative costs, subject to necessary regulatory and shareholder approvals. The Board also approved audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, along with additional investments in OWNDAYS Inc. and its subsidiary.

headline: Record Date
summary: Gabriel India Limited has fixed May 29, 2026, as the Record Date to determine shareholders of Asia Investments Private Limited eligible to receive Gabriel India shares under a sanctioned Composite Scheme of Arrangement. The scheme involves the amalgamation of Anchemco India Private Limited into Asia Investments, followed by the demerger of a business undertaking into Gabriel India. This step follows the receipt of NCLT approval for the arrangement.

headline: General Updates
summary: Medi Assist Healthcare Services Limited announced that the Regional Director has referred its Scheme of Amalgamation to the National Company Law Tribunal, Bengaluru. The scheme involves the merger of International Healthcare Management Services Private Limited with Mayfair Consultancy Services India Private Limited. The company clarified that this internal restructuring will not impact its consolidated financial statements.

headline: General Updates
summary: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank has announced that an NCLT order dated May 18, 2026, was uploaded to the tribunal’s website on May 20, 2026, scheduling a joint petition hearing for July 23, 2026. The bank will comply with all directions in the order within the stipulated timelines and noted that a certified copy is still awaited.

headline: General Updates
summary: GOCL Corporation Limited has received a "no adverse observations" letter from BSE Limited regarding its proposed scheme of merger by absorption of Hinduja National Power Corporation Limited. The scheme remains subject to approval from the NCLT, shareholders, and other regulatory authorities. BSE's letter includes several compliance conditions, such as disclosing ongoing legal proceedings and ensuring financials used in the scheme are not more than six months old.

headline: Amalgamation/Merger
summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited announced its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified audit opinion. The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹10 per share and approved the re-appointment of Dr. Prathap C Reddy as Executive Chairman and Ms. Rama Bijapurkar as an Independent Director, both subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting on August 25, 2026.

headline: Other Restructuring
summary: Bosch Limited's Board approved audited financial results for FY2026 with an unmodified audit opinion and recommended a final dividend of ₹270 per share. The Board also approved a joint venture agreement with Wheels India and Brakes India to form a new company focused on commercial vehicle air systems, with Bosch holding a 50% stake. Additionally, Dr. Pawan Kumar Goenka concluded his tenure as Independent Director, while Mr. Ramesh Ramadurai was appointed as his successor, subject to shareholder approval.

headline: General Updates
summary: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has issued a general update regarding compliance with Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013, pertaining to a scheme of arrangement. The announcement confirms the company's adherence to legal procedures under the Act for the proposed scheme. No further details on the scheme's specifics were provided.

headline: Scheme of Arrangement
summary: Triveni Engineering & Industries Limited has announced a Scheme of Arrangement under Sections 230-232 of the Companies Act, 2013. The scheme involves a corporate restructuring process as per legal provisions. Further details are expected to follow regulatory approvals and filings.
